google_client_id.description: Google OAuth 2.0 client ID (shared for Calendar + Tasks).

google_refresh_token.description: Long-lived refresh token covering both Calendar and Tasks scopes. Run `gurney auth gurney-everyday-assistant` to obtain.

calendar_id.description: Google Calendar ID to read/write. Default: primary.

default_tasklist.description: Google Tasks list ID to read/write. Default: @default (your primary list).

nudge_lookahead_minutes.description: How many minutes ahead to send event reminder nudges.

nudge_chat_id.description: Telegram chat that receives event reminder nudges. Auto-saved when you use /addevent or /quickadd.

default_location.description: Default city for weather lookups and briefings (e.g. London, New York, Calgary).

morning_time.description: Time for morning briefing in HH:MM 24-hour format (weekdays). Default: 07:00.

night_time.description: Time for evening briefing in HH:MM 24-hour format (every day). Default: 21:00.

time_zone.description: IANA timezone for briefing schedules, date ranges, and displayed calendar times (e.g. America/New_York). Defaults to system timezone.

include_calendar.description: Include Google Calendar events in briefings.

briefing_chat_id.description: Telegram chat that receives scheduled briefings. Auto-saved when you run /morningbrief or /nightbrief.

weather_reschedule_times.description: Times (HH:MM, 24-hour, comma-separated) to run the weather-reschedule sweep that flags outdoor events when the forecast worsens. Default: 06:00,18:00.
